channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Experts Warn of Unplanned Urbanisation in Pakistan’s Major Cities and Climate Risks
item.description: During the second edition of the Breathe Pakistan International Climate Change Conference in Islamabad, experts, policymakers, and stakeholders gathered to discuss the pressing climate and urbanisatio...

item.title: Miss Universe Philippines Bea Millan-Windorski addresses recent criticism
item.description: Bea Millan-Windorski, the reigning Miss Universe Philippines, recently addressed remarks labeling her as 'opportunist' and 'performative.' During an interview, she calmly responded to these criticisms...

item.title: Sabres take Game 1 with strong power-play performance against Canadiens
item.description: In the opening game of their first post-season meeting in 28 years, the Buffalo Sabres defeated the Montreal Canadiens 4-2, giving the Canadian team an early challenge in the series. Buffalo jumped ou...

item.title: Reflecting on a Century of David Attenborough’s Contribution to Nature and Conservation
item.description: To commemorate Sir David Attenborough’s centenary, Madeleine Finlay engages in a discussion with natural history writer Patrick Barkham, who has had the privilege of meeting the renowned broadcaster. ...

item.title: PSG secure place in Champions League final after draw with Bayern Munich
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain don waka enter the UEFA Champions League final after dem play Bayern Munich for Wednesday night, tie 1-1 but PSG carry 6-5 overall from the two legs. Ousmane Dembélé begin game cor...

item.title: Regina city council approves Brandt’s acquisition of REAL properties after review
item.description: Regina city council has approved Brandt’s proposed purchase of properties owned by the Regina Exhibition Association Limited (REAL), marking a significant development in the city’s management of key e...

item.title: Mother’s Day Ideas: Spending Quality Time with Mom Over Gifts
item.description: This Mother’s Day, instead of the usual wrapped gifts, the best way to show appreciation for moms is by sharing meaningful experiences together. The article suggests a variety of activities tailored t...

item.title: Simeone Praises Koke and Shows Support for Griezmann After Atletico Madrid Knocked Out of Champions League
item.description: After Atletico Madrid suffer small defeat against Arsenal for UEFA Champions League semi-final, Diego Simeone still dey hail him captain Koke for strong performance wey show say the man still get clas...

item.title: KwaZulu-Natal police report gangs exploiting spaza shops for criminal purposes
item.description: KwaZulu-Natal police commissioner, Lt-Gen Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, has raised concerns about the use of spaza shops as fronts for gang-related criminal activities. During a briefing to parliament’s portfol...

item.title: ABS-CBN Hosts Online Talk Show with Lou Yanong, LA Santos, River Joseph, and Albie Casiño
item.description: ABS-CBN Studios recently featured Lou Yanong, LA Santos, River Joseph, and Albie Casiño on its online talk show, Kapamilya Chat 2026. The show aims to engage fans by providing a platform for Kapamilya...

item.title: U.S. government explores using oil under military bases to replenish strategic reserves
item.description: The Trump administration is exploring the potential of extracting oil located beneath U.S. military bases and other federal properties to help replenish the Strategic Petroleum Reserve, which has drop...

item.title: Iran Expected to Respond to US Peace Proposal Amid Ongoing Tensions
item.description: Iran is expected to provide a response today to a U.S. proposal aimed at ending the ongoing war, signaling progress toward a short memorandum that would mark the official cessation of hostilities. The...

item.title: Dutch Psychiatrists Advise Canada Against Expanding MAID to Mental Illness Cases
item.description: During the seventh and final meeting of a special joint committee reviewing the potential expansion of medical assistance in dying (MAID) to individuals whose sole underlying condition is mental illne...

item.title: Trump and Pope Leo XIV clash again over Iran war as Rubio prepares Vatican visit
item.description: Tensions between President Donald Trump and Pope Leo XIV have resurfaced in the days leading up to Secretary of State Marco Rubio’s planned visit to the Vatican. The renewed dispute stems from Trump’s...

item.title: Returning Australians with Islamic State links expected to be arrested upon arrival
item.description: Several Australians who joined Islamic State, including women and their children, are returning home this week amid police plans to arrest some on arrival. Janai Safar, one of the so-called 'ISIS brid...

item.title: NCRB Report Shows 34,878 Juvenile Cases Registered in 2024, Up 11.2% from 2023
item.description: According to the latest NCRB report 'Crime in India', a total of 34,878 cases were registered against juveniles in 2024, showing an 11.2% increase from 31,365 cases reported in 2023. Overall, 42,633 j...

item.title: Scott Moe emphasizes export diversification and North American cooperation at NASCO conference
item.description: Saskatchewan Premier Scott Moe addressed an international audience at the NASCO Conference held at Hotel Saskatchewan on May 6, 2026, where leaders from Canada, the United States, and Mexico gathered ...

item.title: Experts urge preservation of Karachi’s coastal islands for environmental and community benefit

item.title: Constitutional Court to Rule on EFF Challenge in Phala Phala Case
item.description: The Presidency, like the rest of the nation, is awaiting the Constitutional Court's ruling on the Economic Freedom Fighters’ (EFF) challenge regarding Parliament’s handling of the Phala Phala matter. ...

item.title: Manitoba Moose fall behind in Central Division Semifinal after Game 3 defeat
item.description: The Manitoba Moose are once again in a challenging position in the Calder Cup Playoffs. After Game 3 of the Central Division Semifinal in Grand Rapids, Michigan, the Moose fell 4-2 to the Grand Rapids...
